title: Ultimate Survival Client
description: The ultimate client for survival Minecraft. This modpack aims to greatly improve performance from low-end to high-end systems. It is created to give survival Minecraft a new aesthetic with many quality-of-life and visual improvements!
body:
The ultimate client for survival Minecraft. This modpack aims to greatly improve performance from low-end to high-end systems. It is created to give survival Minecraft a new aesthetic with many quality-of-life and visual improvements, fixing many mistakes and visual errors of vanilla Minecraft!
**Some mods in this modpack:**
- Graphic improvement mods such as 3D skin layers and Animatica
- Quality-of-life mods like Jade and Appleskin
- A more immersive sound experience using the likes of Sound physics remastered and AmbientSounds
- Xaero's minimap and World map
- Optimization mods like Sodium BadOptimizations and More Culling
- Most of Optifine's features
- Some resource packs that many people might use
- Many multiplayer features thanks to Essential mod

I try to keep the modpack updated while still having most of the mods available for newer versions when I do!
